clarity.notes: The deck follows the beginner progression from key-value basics through creation, access, mutation, conditionals, loops, nesting, and comprehension.

hierarchy.notes: Each slide has one headline, one teaching point, and either a code example or editable visual explanation.

typography.notes: Large classroom-readable headings and monospace code panels are used throughout; long output wraps in dedicated panels.

motion.notes: Navigation is simple and predictable with keyboard controls, persisted position, and copy interactions for runnable code.

brand.notes: The visual system is intentionally instructional: light canvas, blue concept accent, green value/output states, and amber exercise callouts.

static: Found two copyable runnable Python examples.
verification.rendered_preview: Unavailable in this run because no in-app browser surface was exposed.
